title: iPhone Fold: Launch Date, Price, Design Leaks and Everything We Know
description: Apple's long-rumored first foldable phone could come in 2026, and rumors are finally giving insight to what it could look like.
summary_ko: 애플의 첫 폴더블 아이폰이 2026년에 출시될 가능성에 대한 루머와 예상 디자인을 다룬 기사입니다. 오랫동안 소문이 돌던 제품의 구체적인 모습이 드러나고 있습니다. 폴더블 기술의 발전과 애플의 진입이 주요 내용입니다.
summary_en: This article covers rumors about Apple's first foldable iPhone potentially launching in 2026 and expected design insights. Long-rumored product details are finally emerging with concrete information. The focus is on foldable technology advancement and Apple's market entry.
so_what_ko: 폴더블 디바이스 시장 진입은 D2C 브랜드에게 새로운 사용자 경험과 마케팅 기회를 제공할 수 있습니다.
so_what_en: Foldable device market entry could provide D2C brands with new user experience opportunities and marketing channels.
key_points: Apple foldable iPhone rumors for 2026
Emerging design insights
Potential new device category

title: Facebook Marketplace now lets Meta AI respond to buyers’ messages
description: When buyers inquire about an item’s availability, sellers can use Meta AI to automatically draft replies using information from their listing, such as the description, availability, pickup location, and price.
summary_ko: 페이스북 마켓플레이스가 Meta AI를 활용해 구매자 문의에 자동으로 답변하는 기능을 도입했습니다. 판매자는 상품 설명, 재고 상태, 픽업 장소, 가격 등 리스팅 정보를 바탕으로 AI가 자동 생성한 답변을 사용할 수 있습니다. 특히 '아직 판매 중인가요?'와 같은 반복적인 질문에 대한 자동 응답 기능을 제공합니다.
summary_en: Facebook Marketplace has introduced Meta AI to automatically respond to buyer inquiries on behalf of sellers. Sellers can use AI-generated replies based on listing information including description, availability, pickup location, and price. The feature specifically addresses repetitive questions like 'Is this still available?' with automated responses.
so_what_ko: D2C 브랜드는 고객 문의 대응 자동화를 통해 운영 효율성을 크게 개선할 수 있으며, AI 기반 고객 서비스 도구 도입을 검토해야 합니다.
so_what_en: D2C brands can significantly improve operational efficiency through automated customer inquiry responses and should consider implementing AI-powered customer service tools.
key_points: Meta AI automatically drafts replies using listing information
Auto-reply feature addresses repetitive availability questions
Sellers can toggle on the feature when creating listings
AI responses are editable by sellers

title: A defense official reveals how AI chatbots could be used for targeting decisions
description: The US military might use generative AI systems to rank lists of targets and make recommendations—which would be vetted by humans—about which to strike first, according to a Defense Department official with knowledge of the matter. The disclosure about how the military may use AI chatbots comes as the Pentagon faces scrutiny over a strike…
summary_ko: 미국 국방부 관계자가 군사용 AI 챗봇이 표적 목록을 순위화하고 타격 우선순위 추천에 활용될 수 있다고 밝혔습니다. 이러한 AI 시스템의 추천사항은 인간의 검증을 거쳐 최종 결정됩니다. 펜타곤이 군사 작전에서의 AI 활용에 대한 면밀한 검토를 받고 있는 상황에서 나온 발언입니다.
summary_en: A Defense Department official revealed that the US military might use generative AI systems to rank target lists and make strike recommendations. These AI recommendations would be vetted by humans before final decisions are made. The disclosure comes as the Pentagon faces scrutiny over military AI usage in operations.
so_what_ko: 군사 분야의 AI 활용 사례는 D2C 비즈니스에서 우선순위 기반 의사결정 자동화 시스템 구축에 참고할 수 있는 사례입니다.
so_what_en: Military AI applications demonstrate priority-based automated decision-making systems that D2C businesses can reference for their own operational optimization.
key_points: AI systems used for target ranking and strike recommendations
Human verification required for AI recommendations
Pentagon facing scrutiny over military AI applications
Generative AI being considered for critical decision support

title: Pragmatic by design: Engineering AI for the real world
description: The impact of artificial intelligence extends far beyond the digital world and into our everyday lives, across the cars we drive, the appliances in our homes, and medical devices that keep people alive. More and more, product engineers are turning to AI to enhance, validate, and streamline the design of the items that furnish our…
summary_ko: 인공지능의 영향력이 디지털 세계를 넘어 자동차, 가전제품, 의료기기 등 일상생활 전반으로 확장되고 있습니다. 제품 엔지니어들이 실제 제품 설계를 향상하고 검증하며 간소화하기 위해 AI를 활용하는 사례가 증가하고 있습니다. 실용적인 관점에서 AI를 현실 세계에 적용하는 엔지니어링 접근법이 주목받고 있습니다.
summary_en: Artificial intelligence impact extends beyond digital realm into everyday items like cars, home appliances, and medical devices. Product engineers increasingly turn to AI to enhance, validate, and streamline design processes for real-world products. A pragmatic engineering approach to applying AI in the physical world is gaining attention.
so_what_ko: D2C 브랜드는 제품 개발 단계에서 AI를 활용한 설계 최적화와 품질 검증을 통해 경쟁력을 확보할 수 있습니다.
so_what_en: D2C brands can gain competitive advantage by leveraging AI for design optimization and quality validation in product development phases.
key_points: AI expanding from digital to physical products
Engineers using AI for design enhancement and validation
Applications in automotive, appliances, and medical devices
Pragmatic approach to real-world AI implementation

title: Facebook Marketplace adds AI auto-replies for annoying ‘Is this still available?’ messages
description:
Facebook Marketplace is adding a bunch of new AI-powered tools that are supposed to make selling items on the platform a little more efficient. One feature will use Meta AI to automatically respond to those annoying "Is this still available?" messages.
You can toggle on the auto-reply option when creating a listing, and Meta AI will draft an editable response to any questions related to availability. In an example shown by Meta, its AI assistant creates an auto-reply saying, "Yes, it's still available. Do you have any questions?"
Facebook Marketplace is trying to speed up the process of listing items, too, as Meta AI can now use the photos …
Read the full story at The Verge.
summary_ko: 페이스북 마켓플레이스가 AI 기반 자동 답변 기능을 추가하여 '아직 판매 중인가요?' 같은 반복적인 메시지에 효율적으로 대응할 수 있게 되었습니다. 리스팅 작성 시 자동 답변 옵션을 활성화하면 Meta AI가 가용성 관련 질문에 편집 가능한 응답을 생성합니다. Meta AI는 또한 사진을 활용해 상품 리스팅 과정을 가속화하는 기능도 제공합니다.
summary_en: Facebook Marketplace added AI-powered auto-reply tools to efficiently handle repetitive messages like 'Is this still available?'. Users can toggle on auto-reply when creating listings, allowing Meta AI to generate editable responses to availability questions. Meta AI also accelerates item listing process using photo analysis.
so_what_ko: D2C 판매자들은 AI 자동 응답 시스템을 통해 고객 대응 시간을 단축하고 판매 효율성을 높일 수 있습니다.
so_what_en: D2C sellers can reduce response time and increase sales efficiency through AI-powered automated reply systems.
key_points: Auto-reply feature for repetitive availability questions
Editable AI-generated responses based on listing details
Toggle option available when creating listings
Photo-based listing acceleration feature included

title: Gemini’s task automation is here and it’s wild
description:
Computers ordering cappuccinos.	

A couple of weeks ago, Google and Samsung announced a big Gemini development coming to their newest devices: task automation. Starting with food delivery and rideshare apps, Gemini would be able to use certain apps on your behalf in a virtual window to take care of things like ordering dinner or getting a car to the airport - all based on simple prompts. You know, all the stuff that we've been promised for years AI assistants will be able to do. That feature wasn't live when I first started testing the S26 Ultra, but it just arrived in beta as part of an update. And boy is it weird watching your phone use itself!
The first prompt I gave it  …
Read the full story at The Verge.
summary_ko: 구글과 삼성이 최신 디바이스에 제미나이 작업 자동화 기능을 베타로 출시했습니다. 음식 배달과 차량 호출 앱에서 시작하여, 제미나이가 가상 창에서 앱을 대신 사용해 저녁 주문이나 공항 이동 차량 예약 등을 처리할 수 있습니다. 간단한 명령어만으로 AI 어시스턴트가 실제 앱 조작을 수행하는 모습이 인상적입니다.
summary_en: Google and Samsung launched Gemini's task automation feature in beta on their newest devices. Starting with food delivery and rideshare apps, Gemini can use apps on your behalf in a virtual window to handle tasks like ordering dinner or booking airport rides. The AI assistant performs actual app operations based on simple prompts, creating an impressive automated experience.
so_what_ko: AI 작업 자동화는 D2C 브랜드의 고객 경험을 혁신할 수 있는 기술로, 주문 프로세스 간소화와 개인화된 서비스 제공에 활용 가능합니다.
so_what_en: AI task automation can revolutionize D2C customer experience through simplified ordering processes and personalized service delivery.
key_points: Gemini automates tasks in food delivery and rideshare apps
AI operates apps in virtual window on user's behalf
Simple prompts trigger complex app interactions
Beta feature available on Samsung S26 and Google Pixel 10

title: Anthropic’s Claude AI can respond with charts, diagrams, and other visuals now
description:
Anthropic's latest update to Claude will allow the AI chatbot to generate custom charts, diagrams, and other visualizations during your conversation. If Claude determines a visual is useful based on the context of your chat, it will insert the image in-line, rather than in its side panel.
As an example, Anthropic says a conversation about the periodic table could lead Claude to generate a visualization of it, featuring interactive elements that let you click inside the table for more information. Another example shows how Claude can generate a visual related to a question about how weight travels through a building.
Though Claude will auto …
Read the full story at The Verge.
summary_ko: Anthropic의 Claude AI가 대화 중 차트, 다이어그램 등 맞춤형 시각화 자료를 생성할 수 있는 기능을 추가했습니다. AI가 맥락상 시각적 자료가 유용하다고 판단하면 사이드 패널이 아닌 대화창에 직접 이미지를 삽입합니다. 주기율표나 건물 구조 설명 등에서 인터랙티브 요소가 포함된 시각화를 제공할 수 있습니다.
summary_en: Anthropic has updated Claude AI to generate custom charts, diagrams, and visualizations during conversations. When Claude determines a visual would be useful based on context, it inserts images inline rather than in a side panel. Examples include interactive periodic table visualizations and building structure diagrams with clickable elements.
so_what_ko: D2C 브랜드들은 제품 설명이나 고객 상담에서 Claude의 시각화 기능을 활용해 더 직관적이고 효과적인 커뮤니케이션을 구현할 수 있습니다.
so_what_en: D2C brands can leverage Claude's visualization capabilities for more intuitive product explanations and customer support, enhancing communication effectiveness.
key_points: Claude can now generate custom visual content during conversations
Images are inserted inline based on contextual relevance
Interactive elements enable deeper user engagement
Applications include educational and explanatory content

title: Anthropic doesn’t trust the Pentagon, and neither should you
description:
Today we’re talking about the messy, fast-moving situation at Anthropic, the maker of Claude that now finds itself in a very ugly legal battle with the Pentagon. 
The back-and-forth is complicated, but as of a few days ago, the Pentagon had deemed Anthropic a supply chain risk, and Anthropic has filed a lawsuit challenging that designation, saying the government has violated its First and Fifth Amendment rights by “seeking to destroy the economic value created by one of the world’s fastest-growing private companies.” I can tell you right now: We’re going to be talking about the twists and turns of that case on The Verge and here on Decoder in the months to come.
But today I wanted to take a moment and really dig in here on one very important element of this situation that’s not gotten enough attention as this has spiraled out of control: how the United States government does surveillance, the legal authority that allows that surveillance to occur, and why Anthropic was distrustful of t
summary_ko: Anthropic이 미국 국방부로부터 공급망 위험 기업으로 지정된 것에 대해 법적 대응에 나섰습니다. 회사는 정부가 수정헌법 1조와 5조를 위반했다며 소송을 제기했습니다. 이 사건은 정부 감시와 AI 기업에 대한 법적 권한 문제를 부각시키고 있습니다.
summary_en: Anthropic has filed a lawsuit challenging the Pentagon's designation of the company as a supply chain risk. The company claims the government violated its First and Fifth Amendment rights and seeks to destroy economic value. The case highlights issues around government surveillance and legal authority over AI companies.
so_what_ko: AI 기술을 활용하는 D2C 기업들은 정부 규제와 감시 이슈가 비즈니스에 미칠 수 있는 리스크를 사전에 검토하고 대비해야 합니다.
so_what_en: D2C companies using AI technology should proactively assess and prepare for potential government regulatory and surveillance risks that could impact their business operations.
key_points: Anthropic designated as Pentagon supply chain risk
Company filed lawsuit citing constitutional violations
Case involves government surveillance authority issues
Highlights regulatory risks for AI companies

title: Zevia doubles down on AI satire in ads starring creepy robot coworker
description: The campaign, which shows a robot employee short circuiting over a sip of Zevia, follows the brand skewering Coke’s AI-generated holiday marketing.
summary_ko: 제로칼로리 음료 브랜드 Zevia가 AI를 풍자하는 광고 캠페인을 지속하고 있습니다. 로봇 직장 동료가 Zevia를 마시고 합선되는 모습을 담은 광고를 선보였습니다. 이는 코카콜라의 AI 생성 홀리데이 마케팅을 조롱한 이전 캠페인의 연장선입니다.
summary_en: Zero-calorie beverage brand Zevia continues its AI satire campaign with ads featuring a creepy robot coworker who short circuits after sipping Zevia. This follows the brand's previous campaign that mocked Coke's AI-generated holiday marketing. The campaign uses humor to differentiate from AI-heavy marketing trends.
so_what_ko: D2C 브랜드들은 AI 기술 트렌드에 대한 반대 포지셔닝을 통해 차별화된 브랜드 아이덴티티를 구축하고 소비자들의 관심을 끌 수 있습니다.
so_what_en: D2C brands can create differentiated brand identity and capture consumer attention by positioning against AI technology trends through satirical marketing approaches.
key_points: Zevia uses AI satire as marketing strategy
Campaign features robot employee short circuiting
Follows previous anti-AI marketing approach
Differentiates from AI-heavy competitor campaigns

title: TreSemmé links with ‘The Devil Wears Prada 2’ for affordable luxury push
description: The Unilever brand is focusing on traditional media for a campaign that features podcaster Paige DeSorbo and promotes its A-List Collection.
summary_ko: TreSemmé가 '악마는 프라다를 입는다 2'와 파트너십을 맺고 합리적 럭셔리 포지셔닝을 강화하고 있습니다. 유니레버 브랜드는 팟캐스터 Paige DeSorbo를 기용한 캠페인에서 전통 미디어에 집중했습니다. A-List 컬렉션을 홍보하는 이번 캠페인이 주목받고 있습니다.
summary_en: TreSemmé has partnered with 'The Devil Wears Prada 2' to push its affordable luxury positioning. The Unilever brand is focusing on traditional media for a campaign featuring podcaster Paige DeSorbo. The campaign promotes the brand's A-List Collection targeting accessible premium positioning.
so_what_ko: D2C 뷰티 브랜드들은 인기 영화나 셀럽리티와의 파트너십을 통해 프리미엄 포지셔닝을 강화하면서도 접근 가능한 가격대를 유지하는 전략을 활용할 수 있습니다.
so_what_en: D2C beauty brands can leverage partnerships with popular films or celebrities to reinforce premium positioning while maintaining accessible pricing strategies.
key_points: Partnership with major film franchise for brand positioning
Focus on affordable luxury market segment
Traditional media approach with influencer integration
Celebrity endorsement strategy for premium appeal

title: Why Dove turned Reddit product feedback into a real-world campaign
description: Emily Barfoot, head of Dove U.S., discusses how the campaign came together, navigating Reddit and the brand’s larger social media strategy.
summary_ko: Dove가 Reddit의 제품 피드백을 실제 캠페인으로 발전시킨 사례가 주목받고 있습니다. Dove 미국 헤드 Emily Barfoot이 Reddit 플랫폼 활용과 브랜드의 소셜미디어 전략에 대해 설명했습니다. 원문에서 확인되지 않음.
summary_en: Dove has turned Reddit product feedback into a real-world marketing campaign, drawing attention for this innovative approach. Emily Barfoot, head of Dove U.S., discussed navigating Reddit and the brand's broader social media strategy. Specific campaign details are not confirmed in the source.
so_what_ko: D2C 브랜드들은 Reddit과 같은 커뮤니티 플랫폼에서 나오는 진정한 소비자 피드백을 마케팅 캠페인 소재로 활용하여 authenticity를 높일 수 있습니다.
so_what_en: D2C brands can enhance authenticity by transforming genuine consumer feedback from community platforms like Reddit into marketing campaign materials.
key_points: Reddit feedback transformed into marketing campaign
Community-driven content strategy
Social listening turned into campaign material
Authentic consumer voice integration

title: Retrieval After RAG: Hybrid Search, Agents, and Database Design — Simon Hørup Eskildsen of Turbopuffer
description: Turbopuffer came out of a reading app.
summary_ko: Turbopuffer는 독서 앱에서 시작된 RAG 기술 기반의 하이브리드 검색 솔루션입니다. AI 에이전트와 데이터베이스 설계를 통해 검색 성능을 향상시키는 기술을 제공합니다. RAG 이후의 차세대 검색 기술 발전 방향을 제시하고 있습니다.
summary_en: Turbopuffer is a hybrid search solution based on RAG technology that originated from a reading app. It provides technology to improve search performance through AI agents and database design. The company presents the next-generation search technology development direction after RAG.
so_what_ko: D2C 기업들은 고객 데이터 검색과 개인화를 위해 하이브리드 RAG 기술을 활용할 수 있습니다.
so_what_en: D2C companies can leverage hybrid RAG technology for customer data search and personalization.
key_points: RAG 기술 기반 하이브리드 검색 솔루션
AI 에이전트와 데이터베이스 설계 통합
독서 앱에서 발전한 검색 기술

title: [AINews] Replit Agent 4: The Knowledge Work Agent
description: Replit Agent 4 lets us reflect on a couple disparate releases.
summary_ko: Replit Agent 4는 지식 작업을 위한 AI 에이전트로 출시되었습니다. 다양한 릴리즈와 연계하여 개발 워크플로우를 개선하는 기능을 제공합니다. 개발자들의 지식 작업 효율성을 높이는 것이 목표입니다.
summary_en: Replit Agent 4 was released as an AI agent for knowledge work. It provides features that improve development workflows in connection with various releases. The goal is to increase developers' knowledge work efficiency.
so_what_ko: D2C 기업들은 개발팀의 생산성 향상을 위해 AI 에이전트 도구를 도입할 수 있습니다.
so_what_en: D2C companies can adopt AI agent tools to improve development team productivity.
key_points: 지식 작업 특화 AI 에이전트
개발 워크플로우 개선 기능
개발자 생산성 향상 도구

title: Rakuten fixes issues twice as fast with Codex
description: Rakuten uses Codex, the coding agent from OpenAI, to ship software faster and safer, reducing MTTR 50%, automating CI/CD reviews, and delivering full-stack builds in weeks.
summary_ko: 라쿠텐이 OpenAI의 Codex를 활용하여 소프트웨어 개발 속도를 향상시켰습니다. MTTR을 50% 단축하고 CI/CD 리뷰를 자동화하여 더 빠르고 안전한 소프트웨어 출시를 달성했습니다. 풀스택 빌드를 몇 주 만에 완성할 수 있게 되었습니다.
summary_en: Rakuten uses OpenAI's Codex to improve software development speed. They achieved faster and safer software releases by reducing MTTR by 50% and automating CI/CD reviews. Full-stack builds can now be completed in weeks.
so_what_ko: D2C 기업들은 AI 코딩 에이전트를 도입하여 개발 속도를 크게 향상시키고 운영 효율성을 높일 수 있습니다.
so_what_en: D2C companies can significantly improve development speed and operational efficiency by adopting AI coding agents.
key_points: MTTR 50% 단축 달성
CI/CD 리뷰 프로세스 자동화
풀스택 개발 주기 단축

title: Designing AI agents to resist prompt injection
description: How ChatGPT defends against prompt injection and social engineering by constraining risky actions and protecting sensitive data in agent workflows.
summary_ko: OpenAI가 프롬프트 인젝션 공격에 저항하는 AI 에이전트 설계 방법을 공개했습니다. ChatGPT는 위험한 행동을 제한하고 민감한 데이터를 보호하여 프롬프트 인젝션과 사회공학 공격을 방어합니다. 에이전트 워크플로우에서 보안을 강화하는 구체적인 방법을 제시했습니다.
summary_en: OpenAI revealed methods for designing AI agents resistant to prompt injection attacks. ChatGPT defends against prompt injection and social engineering by constraining risky actions and protecting sensitive data. They presented specific methods to enhance security in agent workflows.
so_what_ko: D2C 기업들은 고객 데이터를 다루는 AI 시스템에서 보안 설계를 우선시하여 브랜드 신뢰를 보호해야 합니다.
so_what_en: D2C companies must prioritize security design in AI systems handling customer data to protect brand trust.
key_points: 프롬프트 인젝션 공격 방어 기술
민감한 데이터 보호 메커니즘
AI 에이전트 보안 설계 방법론

title: Wayfair boosts catalog accuracy and support speed with OpenAI
description: Wayfair uses OpenAI models to improve ecommerce support and product catalog accuracy, automating ticket triage and enhancing millions of product attributes at scale.
summary_ko: 웨이페어가 OpenAI 모델을 활용하여 이커머스 지원과 제품 카탈로그 정확성을 향상시켰습니다. 티켓 분류를 자동화하고 수백만 개의 제품 속성을 대규모로 개선했습니다. AI를 통해 고객 지원 속도와 카탈로그 품질을 동시에 향상시켰습니다.
summary_en: Wayfair uses OpenAI models to improve ecommerce support and product catalog accuracy. They automated ticket triage and enhanced millions of product attributes at scale. AI simultaneously improved customer support speed and catalog quality.
so_what_ko: D2C 기업들은 AI를 활용하여 고객 지원을 자동화하고 제품 정보의 정확성을 대규모로 개선하여 운영 효율성을 크게 향상시킬 수 있습니다.
so_what_en: D2C companies can significantly improve operational efficiency by using AI to automate customer support and enhance product information accuracy at scale.
key_points: 고객 지원 티켓 자동 분류
수백만 제품 속성 대규모 개선
이커머스 운영 효율성 향상

title: From model to agent: Equipping the Responses API with a computer environment
description: How OpenAI built an agent runtime using the Responses API, shell tool, and hosted containers to run secure, scalable agents with files, tools, and state.
summary_ko: OpenAI가 Responses API를 활용해 파일, 도구, 상태를 관리하는 확장 가능한 에이전트 런타임을 구축했습니다. 호스팅된 컨테이너와 셸 도구를 통해 안전하고 확장 가능한 AI 에이전트 환경을 제공합니다. 이를 통해 모델에서 실제 작업을 수행하는 에이전트로의 전환이 가능해졌습니다.
summary_en: OpenAI has built an agent runtime using the Responses API with shell tools and hosted containers for secure, scalable agent operations. The system manages files, tools, and state to enable comprehensive agent functionality. This represents a transition from basic models to fully functional agents capable of real-world task execution.
so_what_ko: D2C 브랜드는 이러한 에이전트 기술을 활용해 고객 서비스, 주문 처리, 재고 관리 등의 업무를 자동화할 수 있습니다.
so_what_en: D2C brands can leverage this agent technology to automate customer service, order processing, and inventory management operations.
key_points: OpenAI builds agent runtime with Responses API
Secure containerized environment for AI agents
Manages files, tools, and state for comprehensive functionality
Enables transition from models to actionable agents

title: [AINews] Yann LeCun’s AMI Labs launches with a $1B seed @ $4.5B to build world models around JEPA
description: World Models are what next generation AI needs.
summary_ko: 얀 르쿤의 AMI Labs가 45억 달러 밸류에이션으로 10억 달러 시드 투자를 받아 출범했습니다. JEPA 기반의 차세대 AI 월드 모델 개발에 집중할 예정입니다. 월드 모델이 차세대 AI의 핵심 요소라고 강조했습니다.
summary_en: Yann LeCun's AMI Labs launched with $1 billion seed funding at a $4.5 billion valuation. The company will focus on developing world models around JEPA for next-generation AI. World models are positioned as essential for future AI development.
so_what_ko: D2C 기업들은 향후 더 정교한 예측과 계획이 가능한 AI 시스템을 통해 고객 행동 예측과 개인화 서비스를 크게 개선할 수 있을 것입니다.
so_what_en: D2C companies will benefit from more sophisticated AI systems capable of better customer behavior prediction and personalization through advanced world modeling.
key_points: $1B seed funding for AMI Labs at $4.5B valuation
Focus on JEPA-based world models
World models as foundation for next-gen AI
Led by AI pioneer Yann LeCun

title: Designing AI agents that know when to step back
description: As AI agents become more autonomous, the key challenge isn't what they can do; it's how to design the human side of the equation.
summary_ko: Amazon Science가 AI 에이전트가 언제 후퇴해야 하는지 아는 설계 방법론을 제시했습니다. AI 에이전트가 더 자율적이 될수록 핵심 과제는 기능보다 인간과의 상호작용 설계라고 강조했습니다. 적절한 인간 개입 시점을 판단하는 것이 중요합니다.
summary_en: Amazon Science presents design methodologies for AI agents that know when to step back from autonomous action. As AI agents become more autonomous, the key challenge shifts from capabilities to designing human interaction patterns. Determining appropriate human intervention points is crucial for effective agent design.
so_what_ko: D2C 브랜드는 고객 서비스 AI가 복잡한 문제를 인간 상담원에게 적절히 에스컬레이션할 수 있는 시스템을 구축해야 합니다.
so_what_en: D2C brands should build systems where customer service AI can appropriately escalate complex issues to human agents.
key_points: AI agents need to know when to step back
Human-AI interaction design is the key challenge
Autonomous capabilities less important than collaboration design
Focus on appropriate intervention timing

title: Building a strong data infrastructure for AI agent success
description: In the race to adopt and show value from AI, enterprises are moving faster than ever to deploy agentic AI as copilots, assistants, and autonomous task-runners. In late 2025, nearly two-thirds of companies were experimenting with AI agents, while 88% were using AI in at least one business function, up from 78% in 2024, according…
summary_ko: MIT Technology Review에 따르면 기업들이 AI 에이전트 도입을 가속화하면서 강력한 데이터 인프라 구축이 성공의 핵심으로 부상했습니다. 2025년 말 기준 기업의 3분의 2가 AI 에이전트를 실험하고 있으며, 88%가 최소 한 개 업무 영역에서 AI를 활용합니다. 코파일럿, 어시스턴트, 자율 작업 실행기로 에이전트가 활용되고 있습니다.
summary_en: MIT Technology Review reports that strong data infrastructure has become crucial for AI agent success as enterprises accelerate adoption. Nearly two-thirds of companies were experimenting with AI agents by late 2025, while 88% use AI in at least one business function. Agents are deployed as copilots, assistants, and autonomous task-runners.
so_what_ko: D2C 기업들은 AI 에이전트 도입 전에 견고한 데이터 인프라를 우선 구축하여 에이전트의 효과적인 학습과 작업 수행을 보장해야 합니다.
so_what_en: D2C companies must prioritize building robust data infrastructure before deploying AI agents to ensure effective learning and task execution.
key_points: Strong data infrastructure crucial for AI agent success
67% of companies experimenting with AI agents by late 2025
88% of companies using AI in business functions
Agents serve as copilots, assistants, and task-runners

title: Improving instruction hierarchy in frontier LLMs
description: IH-Challenge trains models to prioritize trusted instructions, improving instruction hierarchy, safety steerability, and resistance to prompt injection attacks.
summary_ko: OpenAI가 최첨단 LLM에서 명령 계층 구조를 개선하는 IH-Challenge를 발표했습니다. 이 방법은 모델이 신뢰할 수 있는 명령을 우선시하도록 훈련시킵니다. 명령 계층 구조 개선, 안전성 조정성, 프롬프트 주입 공격 저항성을 향상시킵니다.
summary_en: OpenAI announced IH-Challenge to improve instruction hierarchy in frontier LLMs by training models to prioritize trusted instructions. The system enhances instruction hierarchy management, safety steerability, and resistance to prompt injection attacks. This addresses critical security and control issues in advanced language models.
so_what_ko: D2C 브랜드는 더 안전하고 신뢰할 수 있는 AI 시스템을 통해 고객 데이터 보호와 브랜드 일관성을 유지하면서 AI 서비스를 제공할 수 있게 됩니다.
so_what_en: D2C brands can deliver AI services with better customer data protection and brand consistency through more secure and reliable AI systems.
key_points: IH-Challenge improves instruction hierarchy in LLMs
Models trained to prioritize trusted instructions
Enhanced safety steerability and attack resistance
Addresses security and control in advanced AI models

title: Answer engine optimization strategy beyond basic SEO and AEO tactics
description: If you’re not in the trenches of search every single day, it’s hard to know how seriously to take answer engine optimization strategy. There are two dominant camps right now: those who see generative AI as the most disruptive shift search has ever experienced, and those who argue that AEO (or GEO) is simply an extension of traditional SEO.
summary_ko: 답변 엔진 최적화(AEO)가 기존 SEO를 넘어서는 새로운 전략으로 주목받고 있습니다. 생성형 AI를 검색의 가장 파괴적인 변화로 보는 진영과 AEO를 전통적 SEO의 확장으로 보는 진영으로 나뉘어 있습니다. 검색 환경의 변화에 따라 마케터들은 새로운 최적화 전략을 고려해야 할 시점입니다.
summary_en: Answer Engine Optimization (AEO) is emerging as a new strategy beyond traditional SEO tactics. There are two dominant camps: those viewing generative AI as the most disruptive shift in search, and those seeing AEO as simply an extension of traditional SEO. Marketers need to consider new optimization strategies as the search landscape evolves.
so_what_ko: D2C 브랜드는 AI 기반 답변 엔진에 최적화된 콘텐츠 전략을 개발해야 합니다.
so_what_en: D2C brands must develop content strategies optimized for AI-powered answer engines.
key_points: AEO represents evolution beyond traditional SEO
Industry divided on significance of generative AI impact
Search optimization requires new strategic approach

title: How AI is changing the nature of mathematical research
description: What machine learning theorists learned using AI agents to generate proofs — and what comes next.
summary_ko: AI가 수학 연구의 본질을 변화시키고 있다는 아마존 사이언스의 분석입니다. 머신러닝 이론가들이 AI 에이전트를 활용해 수학적 증명을 생성하는 방법을 학습하고 있습니다. 이러한 변화는 향후 연구 방법론에 큰 영향을 미칠 것으로 예상됩니다.
summary_en: Amazon Science analyzes how AI is transforming the nature of mathematical research. Machine learning theorists are learning to use AI agents for generating mathematical proofs. This transformation is expected to significantly impact future research methodologies.
so_what_ko: AI의 수학적 추론 능력 향상은 D2C 데이터 분석과 예측 모델링의 정확성을 크게 향상시킬 것입니다.
so_what_en: Enhanced AI mathematical reasoning will significantly improve D2C data analytics and predictive modeling accuracy.
key_points: AI agents generating mathematical proofs
Machine learning transforming research methods
Fundamental shift in mathematical research approach

title: #199: AI Answers - Do Custom GPTs Still Matter? AI Output Validation, 2026 Job Disruption, Preventing Burnout, and Build vs. Buy
description:
There is no shortcut for AI verification, and that's a good thing. 

Paul Roetzer and Cathy McPhillips answer 15 questions business leaders continue asking again and again. They unpack why AI output verification has no shortcut, where agent-building tools like Claude Code and Lovable actually stand, and the uncomfortable math behind which roles get disrupted next. Paul explains why enterprises are moving painfully slow even as the technology races ahead, how early adopters are creating burnout by doing the work of entire teams, and why situational awareness is the AI superpower most leaders are missing.



00:00:00 — Intro

00:07:00 — Question #1: Do you need to prompt AI the same way every time?

00:10:59 — Question #2: What problem do custom GPTs actually solve?

00:14:26 — Question #3: Are SaaS providers becoming model agnostic?

00:17:09 — Question #4: Why AI voice and tone change when models update.

00:20:36 — Question #5: AI output validation: why there's no shortcut for verific
summary_ko: 마케팅 AI 쇼에서 AI 출력 검증에 단축키가 없다는 점을 강조했습니다. 기업들이 기술 발전 속도에 비해 느리게 움직이는 이유와 조기 도입자들의 번아웃 문제를 다뤘습니다. 상황 인식 능력이 리더들이 놓치고 있는 AI 슈퍼파워라고 설명했습니다.
summary_en: The Marketing AI Show emphasizes there's no shortcut for AI output verification. It addresses why enterprises move slowly compared to technology advancement and burnout issues among early adopters. Situational awareness is described as the AI superpower most leaders are missing.
so_what_ko: D2C 기업은 AI 도입 시 체계적인 검증 프로세스를 구축하고 직원 번아웃을 방지하는 점진적 접근이 필요합니다.
so_what_en: D2C companies need systematic verification processes for AI adoption and gradual approaches to prevent employee burnout.
key_points: AI output verification requires systematic approach
Early adopters experiencing burnout from overwork
Enterprise AI adoption lagging behind technology capabilities
Situational awareness crucial for AI leadership

title: #198: Microsoft AI CEO Predicts Job Automation in 18 Months, AI Productivity Evidence, Dario Amodei Interview & Seedance 2.0
description:
Microsoft's AI CEO just put a 12–18 month expiration date on most white-collar work. But after spending weeks with enterprise executives, Paul Roetzer sees a very different reality: most companies haven't even gotten past giving their teams AI access.

In Ep. 198, Paul and Mike unpack the growing disconnect between AI capability and AI adoption, share Paul's 7-point thought experiment on the future of work, and cover a massive week of news: Dario Amodei's warning about the AI exponential, AI productivity gains finally appearing in economic data, ByteDance's SeaDance 2.0 copyright crisis, Claude Sonnet 4.6, Open Claw's creator joining OpenAI, AI hardware moves from Apple and Meta, and a provocative editorial arguing journalism schools are failing students.

Show Notes: Access the show notes and show links here

Click here to take this week's AI Pulse.

Timestamps:

00:00:00 — Intro

00:05:38 — AI Pulse Survey Results

00:08:48 — Microsoft AI CEO Predicts White Collar Work Automated in 1
summary_ko: 마이크로소프트 AI CEO가 12-18개월 내 대부분의 화이트칼라 업무 자동화를 예측했습니다. 그러나 현실에서 대부분 기업들은 직원들에게 AI 접근 권한을 제공하는 단계에도 이르지 못했습니다. AI 역량과 실제 도입 간의 격차가 점점 벌어지고 있습니다.
summary_en: Microsoft's AI CEO predicts automation of most white-collar work within 12-18 months. However, reality shows most companies haven't even provided AI access to their teams. There's a growing disconnect between AI capability and actual adoption.
so_what_ko: D2C 기업은 AI 역량 발전 속도와 실제 도입 격차를 인식하고 단계적 AI 통합 로드맵을 수립해야 합니다.
so_what_en: D2C companies must recognize the gap between AI capability advancement and actual adoption, establishing phased AI integration roadmaps.
key_points: White-collar automation predicted within 18 months
Most enterprises still at basic AI access stage
Growing gap between AI capability and adoption
Economic data showing AI productivity gains

title: GenAI’s adoption puzzle
description:
Generative AI chatbots might be a life-changing transformation in the 
nature of computing, that can replace all software, but so far, most of its 
users only pick it up every week or two, and far fewer have made it part of 
their lives. Is that a time problem or a product problem?
summary_ko: 생성형 AI 챗봇이 컴퓨팅의 본질을 바꾸는 변화일 수 있지만, 대부분 사용자는 여전히 주 1-2회만 사용하고 있습니다. 일상생활의 일부로 만든 사용자는 더욱 적습니다. 이것이 시간의 문제인지 제품의 문제인지에 대한 의문이 제기되고 있습니다.
summary_en: Generative AI chatbots might transform computing fundamentally, but most users only engage weekly or bi-weekly. Far fewer have integrated it into their daily lives. The question remains whether this is a time problem or a product problem.
so_what_ko: D2C 브랜드는 AI 도구의 실제 사용 패턴을 이해하고 고객의 일상적 사용을 촉진하는 전략이 필요합니다.
so_what_en: D2C brands need to understand actual AI usage patterns and develop strategies to encourage daily customer engagement.
key_points: Low frequency AI usage despite transformative potential
Most users engage only weekly or bi-weekly
Question of time versus product limitation
Gap between capability and daily adoption
